name: minion-desktop
description: Minion — private local memory and semantic search for AI assistants (Tauri + Python sidecar).

scripts.tauri:build:macos: bunx tauri build && bash ./scripts/postbuild_macos_sanitize_app.sh ./src-tauri/target/release/bundle/macos/Minion.app && APP=$(ls -td /var/folders/*/*/*/cursor-sandbox-cache/*/cargo-target/release/bundle/macos/Minion.app 2>/dev/null | head -n 1) && ditto -c -k --sequesterRsrc --keepParent "$APP" "${APP}.zip"
